title: Seed intro-page HTML body: remaining A-Guy references
body: The HTML body in src/server/payload/endpoints/seed/intro-page.ts still contains ~12 instances of 'A-Guy' in descriptive paragraphs (e.g., 'A-Guy treats educational content as structured data...', 'In A-Guy, exercises are AI-aware atoms...'). These are body copy, not just titles. Consider Option B from issue #1580: per-brand seed content files at src/brands/<slug>/seed/intro-page.ts, to be done in a follow-up when adding a second brand.
rationale: The seed HTML describes the A-Guy product specifically. Full templating would require rewriting every descriptive paragraph. Option B (per-brand seed files) is the recommended follow-up approach.

title: Login page brand references not in scope
body: src/app/(frontend)/login/LoginForm.tsx has alt='A-Guy' on the telescope SVG image, and LoginPageContent.tsx has mailto:support@aguy.co.il. These were not listed in issue #1580 scope and were not modified. If these need to be brand-aware, a separate issue should track this.
rationale: The login page brand references are user-visible but were not called out in issue #1580 scope. A follow-up issue can address these.
